# type

**Instance Property**

The type of data contained in a buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
var type: MDLMeshBufferType { get }
```

## Discussion

A buffer can contain per-vertex data for one or more vertex attributes of a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh] object ([doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferType/vertex]), or index data for a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLSubmesh] object ([doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferType/index]).

## Inspecting a Buffer

- **allocator**: The allocator object that created the buffer.
- **zone**: The memory pool from which the buffer was created.
